name: update_document
description: Update an existing document in a Fauna collection by its ID. Supports partial updates that merge new fields with existing data, or use replace() for full document replacement. The update is transactional and immediately consistent.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: The name of the collection containing the document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document to update.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: The fields to update. Only specified fields are changed; others remain untouched.
